auth.label: Access Key
auth.description: screenshot.fyi access key appended as the accessKey query parameter. Create an account at https://www.screenshot.fyi/register, then copy your key from the screenshot.fyi dashboard.

actions.name: take_screenshot
actions.description: Capture a website screenshot with screenshot.fyi and return the generated URL.

url.description: The complete website URL to capture, including the protocol.

fullPage.description: Whether to capture the full scrollable page instead of only the viewport.

darkMode.description: Whether to render the target page with dark mode enabled.

disableCookieBanners.description: Whether screenshot.fyi should hide cookie banners before capture.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for capturing a website screenshot with screenshot.fyi.

url.description: The generated screenshot URL returned by screenshot.fyi.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a screenshot.fyi screenshot capture.
